step1.title: Welcome, {{name}}!
step1.body: That's your player: name, country, primary and secondary position, age, dominant foot and your OVR — your overall rating. All of it grows with training.

step2.title: Your Energy
step2.body: Energy is your most important resource: you use it to train and to play matches. It regenerates 30% per day, so you can't burn it all at once — take care of it.

step3.title: Your status now
step3.body: You started with R$ 5,000 in the bank and no club — you're a free agent. No contract, no salary yet. To get steady income and play official matches, you need to join a team.

step4.title: Next step: find a club
step4.body: Click here on Club in the left sidebar. At a club you train better (with the team's facilities), get a weekly salary, play official matches and integrate with your teammates. Inside you'll find the button to look for a team that wants you.

step1.title: This is your League!
step1.body:
Here you follow everything about the season:
• Standings — the league table
• Rounds — all matches by round
• Stats — top scorers, assists and more
• Find a club — where we are now, to find you a team

Let's focus on finding a team for you.

step2.title: Clubs that can take you in
step2.body: These are the clubs with a spot for you. Each card is a team. Before signing, it's worth looking at 2 things on each one — I'll show you now.

step3.title: Bot or human? And how many people?
step3.body:
Look at the icon below the name:
🤖 Bot manager — signs your contract right away, guaranteed entry.
👤 Human manager — needs to send you an offer, may take time, but the game is richer.

The human players count tells you how many real people are on the team. More humans = more fun.

step4.title: Let's join
step4.body:
Ready to start?
• Team with bot manager → click Sign contract and you're in.
• Team with human manager → click View club to explore and mark presence.

After signing, come back to Club in the left sidebar — I'll introduce you to your new team! ⚽

step1.title: Welcome to {{clubName}}!
step1.body: This is your team. Up here you see the crest, the name and — below the name — a badge with your manager's type. Each type (defensive / offensive / technical / complete) gives a different bonus to your training.

step2.title: Your manager
step2.body: This is your manager. They decide the lineup, formation and tactics. Treat them well 😄 — and watch their type, because it defines which attributes your training will boost the most.

step3.title: How the team is doing
step3.body:
The club's numbers at a glance:
• Team OVR — average of the 11 starters
• League position + points
• Next match — opponent and time
• Current formation
• Club reputation

Keep an eye here on how the team is performing.

step4.title: Your lineup
step4.body: This is the current lineup. The 11 starters appear with avatar, jersey and position. If you're a starter, your name shows highlighted in blue. The manager picks the lineup — you just check here. Bench and full formation also appear below.

step5.title: Your teammates
step5.body:
Here are all your teammates. Icon 👤 = human, 🤖 = bot. Click any player to see their summary attributes. The more humans on the squad, the more alive the game feels.

Welcome to the team! Let's train and play. ⚽

step1.title: Here are your attributes
step1.body:
This is where you see and train your attributes.

At the top: your energy (no energy = no training) and growth rate — how much you gain per session (drops with age). The History button shows every training you've done.

step2.title: Training bonuses
step2.body:
Each training pays more when you have active bonuses:

• Club manager (defensive / offensive / technical / complete) — bonus on specific attributes
• Training Center at the club — bonus by level
• Private trainer (buy at the Store) — extra bonus

Click to expand and see your combined bonuses.

step3.title: Equipment adds bonus straight on attributes
step3.body:
Boots and gloves from the Store add bonus straight on specific attributes — for example, a shooting boot adds points in Shot Accuracy.

Here you see everything active right now.

step4.title: Colored border = fit with you
step4.body:
Each attribute has a colored border on the left showing how well it fits your archetype + height + position:

🟩 dark green = +50% (perfect fit)
🟢 lime = +25% (good fit)
🟠 orange = −50% (bad fit)
🟥 red = −70% (almost no gain)

Focus on the greens — that's where your training pays off the most.

step5.title: Train here or plan the week
step5.body:
To train right now: click any attribute on the list — opens a menu with the estimated gain, cost (25% energy) and a Train button.

To plan the week: click here on Training Plan in the left sidebar. You schedule 4 sessions per day and the system trains automatically. Let's level up! 💪

step1.title: Plan the week, the system trains by itself
step1.body:
4 slots per day, 7 days a week. In each slot, pick an attribute to train.

The system runs automatically at the scheduled times — you don't need to come back here all the time.

(Energy, bonuses, equipment and colored fit we already covered on the Attributes & Training page — here it's just planning.)

step2.title: Watch out for match day
step2.body:
Match days show a red warning on the day card. Training in the morning burns energy you'll need for the match at night.

Golden rule: save energy for match days.

step3.title: Save + Trainer tip
step3.body:
After planning, click Save — without it, nothing counts.

Tip: at the Store there's the Trainer, who picks and trains 1 slot per day automatically, without you needing to plan the week at all. Ideal for those who don't want to micro-manage.

step1.title: Your full profile
step1.body:
This is your full profile. Avatar, name, positions, age, foot, height, OVR, club, reputation and balance — all here.

There's a button to copy your public profile link — share it on the Forum so managers can see you and invite you to their team.

step2.title: Your look
step2.body:
This is your player's look, set at the beginning of your career. It shows up everywhere: match field, club lineup, forum, sidebar.

The jersey is pulled automatically from the club — no need to configure.

When you buy items at the Store (boots, gloves), they show up here on your look.

step3.title: Averages and history
step3.body:
Your averages per category (Physical, Technical, Mental, Shooting, Defending, Goalkeeping) — quick view of where you're strong.

Right below is the history of your last trainings with the evolution of each attribute. Good for seeing where you're growing the most.

step4.title: Positions and advanced actions
step4.body:
Primary position: 1st change is free, then costs.
Secondary position (right below): paid, but zeroes the penalty when the manager plays you outside your primary.

Further down you also have options to create a second player (parallel career) and — if you're a free agent — reset the current player and start over.

step1.title: Your matches in one place
step1.body:
Here you see all your matches organized:

• Live / Soon — jump straight into the room
• Upcoming — what's scheduled
• Past — with a replay button

Once you have a club and a calendar, they'll show up here.

step2.title: Next league round + presence
step2.body:
When there's an upcoming league match, it shows up highlighted here.

Mark presence to let the manager know you'll play — it's just informative, the manager decides the lineup. But it helps them plan.

step3.title: Want to test now? Run a Test 5v5
step3.body:
Want to try a match right now? Click Test 5v5 up there.

It opens a quick 5×5 against bots in a new tab, no consequences — to show you in practice:

• Hotkeys (QWERT / ASDF / ZXCVB)
• Turn phases (positioning → action → resolution)
• Inertia, domination, passes, shots...

Learn by doing. Let's go! ⚽

step1.title: Pickup — casual matches
step1.body:
Here you join random people for a quick 5v5 or 11v11 match.

No responsibility, no energy cost, no XP — just for fun and to practice the game's mechanics. If people don't show up at kickoff, bots fill the teams.

step2.title: Create a lobby
step2.body:
Click Create to open a new lobby — pick format (5v5 or 11v11), kickoff time, side of the field and position. Other online players join the open slots.

Max 3 open lobbies on the server — first come, first served.

step1.title: Your financial health
step1.body:
Overview of your money:

• Balance — what you have in the wallet
• Weekly salary — how much the club pays you
• Current club
• Next payment — always on Monday

No contract = no salary. That's why having a club matters.

step2.title: Contract details
step2.body:
Here are the terms of your contract:

• Weekly salary
• Release clause — the amount another club pays to take you from here (without having to negotiate with your manager)
• Start and end dates

If you're without a club, this card shows a shortcut to go find one.

step3.title: Leave the club
step3.body:
Want to leave the club without waiting for an offer from another one?

Click Request Exit to ask the manager for a mutual agreement. If they accept, you become a free agent right away — no clause to pay, no pending. If they refuse, you stay.

step1.title: Your current status
step1.body: Before accepting any offer, remember what you already have: current club, salary, clause. Compare with what's being offered.

step2.title: Offers that came in
step2.body:
Here you see offers from clubs that want to sign you. Each card shows:

• Weekly salary
• Release clause
• Contract duration
• Squad role the manager offers (starter / bench)
• Optional message from the manager

Buttons: Accept joins the club instantly; Reject discards the offer. No offers? Just wait — or promote yourself on the forum.

step1.title: Your credit line
step1.body:
Ball Dynamics Bank. Here you can take a loan if you need cash fast.

The 3 cards show: Current balance, Weekly salary (your fixed income) and Loan limit (how much the bank lends you — calculated from your income).

step2.title: Take a loan
step2.body:
Drag the slider to pick how much to borrow. Loan details appear in real time:

• Term and interest rate
• Weekly payment deducted from your salary
• Total to pay (principal + interest)

Only take what you need — interest is unforgiving.

step3.title: Pay off early
step3.body:
You have an active loan. Each week pays an automatic installment.

Want to be done with it? Click Pay All to settle the remaining balance and stop paying interest — as long as you have enough cash.

step1.title: Categories and your balance
step1.body:
Game store. Your balance shows in the top right.

Each tab is a category: trainer (auto-training), physio (energy regen), gloves (GK only), boots (raises attribute cap), consumables and cosmetics. Items give bonuses in training, match and look.

step2.title: My Items — what's active
step2.body:
Here you see everything you've bought — active, in the inventory, or canceling renewal.

Trainer / physio / gloves have category exclusivity (only 1 active at a time); boots are exclusive per bonus type. When you buy something that conflicts, the game opens a dialog asking if you want to swap.

step1.title: Welcome to the Forum
step1.body:
This is the game's Forum — where the community talks: players, managers, all together.

Good place to introduce yourself (managers see who speaks well and may invite you), discuss tactics, report bugs, or just have fun.

step2.title: Categories
step2.body:
Categories organize the conversation — general, tactics, transfers, suggestions, bugs, off-topic.

Click any to see only that topic's threads.

step3.title: Create a topic
step3.body:
Click New Topic to start a conversation. Pick the category, write the title and the body.

Tip: paste your public profile link (from the Profile page) so managers can see you in one click.
